subject: [MUSIC][CASSANDRA] Use Startup probes
commit_message:
[MUSIC][CASSANDRA] Use Startup probes

Instead of long initial delay on readiness and liveness probes, use
startup probes and be more aggressive on readiness and liveness.
Also, decrease number of replicas from 3 to 1

Issue-ID: OOM-2742
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ideb0ede251332e182b975ff18ca5a75bcbff2351

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

hmmm dozen of failures. Is it this patch or just a bad run?

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2094/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2094/ )
